radar.title: Italy's Meloni says Trump 'made up' story that she 'begged' him for photo at G7
radar.summary: The highly public exchange is an indication that their earlier close ties have frayed since Trump's decision to go to war with Iran.

radar.title: Israel and Hezbollah agree ceasefire, US says, as more Lebanon strikes reported
radar.summary: The agreement followed concerns that continued clashes would undermine the deal to end the war between the US and Iran.

radar.title: U.S. to End AIDS Funding for South Africa
radar.summary: According to an unsigned statement from the State Department, the U.S. will phase out support for H.I.V. prevention and treatment in South Africa.

radar.title: Canadian Billionaire Frank Stronach Is Convicted of Sexual and Indecent Assault
radar.summary: Mr. Stronach, 93, was found guilty of sexual assault and indecent assault in two cases and acquitted on three other charges.
